function pyleoclim.utils.causality.signif_isospec(y1: Any, y2: Any, method: str;, nsim: int, qs: list, kwargs: dict) -> dict

class pyleoclim.core.psds.MultiplePSD(self, psd_list: Any, beta_est_res: Optional[numpy.ndarray])
  anti_alias(self, avgs: int, mute_pbar: bool;) -> pyleoclim.core.psds.MultiplePSD
  beta_est(self, fmin: Optional[float], fmax: Optional[float], logf_binning_step: str;, verbose: bool) -> pyleoclim.core.psds.MultiplePSD
  copy(self)
  plot(self, figsize: list, in_loglog: bool, in_period: bool,, xlabel: Optional[str], ylabel: str, title: Optional[str], xlim: Optional[list], ylim: Optional[list], savefig_settings: Optional[dict], ax: Optional[matplotlib], xticks: Optional[list], yticks: Optional[list], legend: bool, colors: Union[a, one,, a], cmap: Optional[str], norm: Optional[matplotlib.colors.Normalize], plot_kwargs: Optional[dictionary], lgd_kwargs: Optional[dictionary]) -> matplotlib.pyplot.figure
  plot_envelope(self, figsize: list, qs: list, in_loglog: bool, in_period: bool, xlabel: Optional[str], ylabel: str, title: Optional[str], xlim: Optional[list], ylim: Optional[list], savefig_settings: Optional[dict], ax: Optional[matplotlib.ax], xticks: Optional[list], yticks: Optional[list], plot_legend: bool, curve_clr: str, curve_lw: str, shade_clr: str, shade_alpha: float, shade_label: Optional[str], lgd_kwargs: Optional[dict], members_plot_num: int, members_alpha: float, members_lw: float, seed: Optional[int]) -> matplotlib.pyplot.figure
  plot_traces(self, figsize: list, in_loglog: bool, in_period: bool, xlabel: Optional[str], ylabel: str, title: Optional[str], num_traces: int, seed: Optional[int], xticks: Optional[list], yticks: Optional[list], xlim: Optional[list], ylim: Optional[list], linestyle: Literal['-', '--', '-.', ':', '', '(offset', 'on-off-seq)', '...'], savefig_settings: Optional[dict], ax: Optional[matplotlib.ax], legend: bool;, color: str, lw: float, alpha: float, lgd_kwargs: Optional[dict]) -> matplotlib.figure
  quantiles(self, qs: list, lw: list) -> pyleoclim.core.psds.MultiplePSD
class pyleoclim.core.psds.PSD(self, frequency: Union[numpy.ndarray, float], amplitude: Union[numpy.ndarray, float], label: Optional[str], timeseries: Optional[pyleoclim.core.series.Series], plot_kwargs: Optional[dict], spec_method: Optional[str], spec_args: Optional[dict], signif_qs: Optional[pyleoclim.core.scalograms.MultipleScalogram], signif_method: Optional[str], period_unit: Optional[str], beta_est_res: Union[list, numpy.ndarray])
  anti_alias(self, avgs: int) -> pyleoclim.core.psds.PSD
  beta_est(self, fmin: Optional[float], fmax: Optional[float], logf_binning_step: str,, verbose: bool;) -> pyleoclim.core.psds.PSD
  plot(self, in_loglog: bool;, in_period: bool;, label: Optional[str], xlabel: Optional[str], ylabel: str, title: Optional[str], marker: Optional[str], markersize: Optional[int], color: Optional[str], linestyle: Optional[str], linewidth: Optional[float], transpose: bool;, xlim: Optional[list], ylim: Optional[list], figsize: list, savefig_settings: Optional[dict], ax: Optional[ax], legend: bool;, lgd_kwargs: Optional[dict], xticks: Optional[list], yticks: Optional[list], alpha: Optional[float], zorder: Optional[int], plot_kwargs: Optional[dict], signif_clr: str, signif_linestyles: list, signif_linewidth: float, plot_beta: bool;, beta_kwargs: Optional[dict]) -> fig,
  signif_test(self, method: str;, number: Optional[int], seed: Optional[int], qs: list, settings: Optional[dict], scalogram: Optional[pyleoclim.Scalogram]) -> pyleoclim.core.psds.PSD
function pyleoclim.core.psds.infer_period_unit_from_time_unit(time_unit: Any)
class pyleoclim.core.ssares.SsaRes(self, orig: pyleoclim.core.series.Series, label: Any, eigvals: float, eigvecs: float, pctvar: float, PC: float, RCmat: float, RCseries: float, mode_idx: list, eigvals_q: Optional[float])
  copy(self) -> pyleoclim.core.ssares.SsaRes
  modeplot(self, index: int, figsize: list, savefig_settings: Optional[dict], title_kwargs: Optional[dict], spec_method: str, plot_original: Any)

  copy(self) -> pyleoclim.core.scalograms.Scalogram
  plot(self, variable: Literal['amplitude', 'power'], in_scale: bool, xlabel: Optional[str], ylabel: Optional[str], title: Optional[str], ylim: Optional[list], xlim: Optional[list], yticks: Optional[list], figsize: list, signif_clr: str, signif_linestyles: str, signif_linewidths: float, contourf_style: dict, cbar_style: dict, plot_cb: Any, savefig_settings: dict, ax: Optional[ax], signif_thresh: float) -> matplotlib.figure
  signif_test(self, method: Literal['ar1asym', 'ar1sim', 'uar1', 'CN'], number: Optional[int], seed: Optional[int], qs: list, settings: Optional[dict], export_scal: bool;) -> pyleoclim.core.scalograms.Scalogram
class pyleoclim.core.multivardecomp.MultivariateDecomp(self, name: str, eigvals: 1d, eigvecs: 2d, pctvar: float, pcs: 1d, neff: float, orig: Union[pyleoclim.core.multipleseries.MultipleSeries, MultipleGeoSeries])
  modeplot(self, index: int, figsize: list, fig: Optional[Any], savefig_settings: Optional[dict], gs: Optional[matplotlib.gridspec], title: Optional[str], title_kwargs: Optional[dict], spec_method: str, cmap: Optional[str], hue: str, marker: Optional[str], size: Optional[str], scatter_kwargs: Optional[dict], flip: Any, map_kwargs: Optional[dict], gridspec_kwargs: Optional[dict]) -> matplotlib.figure

class pyleoclim.core.resolutions.MultipleResolution(self, resolution_list: list, time_unit: str)
  describe(self) -> dict
  summary_plot(self, figsize: tuple,, xlabel: Optional[str], ylabel: Optional[str], legend: bool, ax: Optional[matplotlib.ax], log_scale: Optional[bool], boxplot_whis: Union[float, pair], boxplot_width: float, boxplot_dodge: bool, boxplot_palette: Union[palette, dict], stripplot_size: float, stripplot_color: str, stripplot_alpha: float, stripplot_dodge: bool, boxplot_kwargs: Optional[dict], stripplot_kwargs: Optional[dict], savefig_settings: Optional[dictionary]) -> matplotlib.figure
class pyleoclim.core.resolutions.Resolution(self, resolution: Union[list, numpy.ndarray], time: Union[list, numpy.ndarray], resolution_unit: Optional[str], label: Optional[str], timeseries: Optional[pyleoclim.core.series.Series])

  make_labels(self) -> str
  plot(self, figsize: list, marker: Optional[str], markersize: Optional[float], color: Optional[str,], linestyle: Optional[str], linewidth: Optional[float], xlim: Optional[Any], ylim: Optional[Any], label: Optional[str], xlabel: Optional[str], ylabel: Optional[str], title: Optional[str], zorder: Optional[int], legend: Literal['True', 'False'], plot_kwargs: Optional[dict], lgd_kwargs: Optional[dict], alpha: Optional[float], savefig_settings: Optional[dict], ax: Optional[matplotlib.axis], invert_xaxis: bool, invert_yaxis: bool) -> matplotlib.figure
class pyleoclim.core.multipleseries.MultipleSeries(self, series_list: list, time_unit: Optional[str], label: Optional[str], name: Optional[Any])
  append(self, ts: pyleoclim.core.series.Series, inplace: Any) -> pyleoclim.core.multipleseries.MultipleSeries
  bin(self, kwargs: dict) -> pyleoclim.core.multipleseries.MultipleSeries
  common_time(self, method: string;, step: Optional[float], start: Optional[float], stop: Optional[float], step_style: Optional[string;], time_axis: Optional[list], kwargs: dict) -> pyleoclim.core.multipleseries.MultipleSeries
  convert_time_unit(self, time_unit: Optional[str])
  copy(self) -> pyleoclim.core.multipleseries.MultipleSeries
  correlation(self, target: Optional[pyleoclim.core.series.Series], timespan: Optional[tuple], alpha: float, statistic: str, method: str,, number: int, settings: Optional[dict], fdr_kwargs: Optional[dict], common_time_kwargs: Optional[dict], mute_pbar: bool;, seed: Union[float, int]) -> pyleoclim.core.correns.CorrEns
  detrend(self, method: str, kwargs: Any) -> pyleoclim.core.multipleseries.MultipleSeries
  equal_lengths(self) -> bool
  filter(self, cutoff_freq: Union[float, list], cutoff_scale: Union[float, list], method: str;, kwargs: dict) -> pyleoclim.core.multipleseries.MultipleSeries
  flip(self, axis: str) -> pyleoclim.core.multipleseries.MultipleSeries
  gkernel(self, kwargs: dict) -> pyleoclim.core.multipleseries.MultipleSeries
  increments(self, step_style: str;, verbose: bool) -> numpy.ndarray
  interp(self, kwargs: keyword) -> pyleoclim.core.multipleseries.MultipleSeries
  pca(self, weights: Optional[ndarray], name: Optional[Any], missing: Literal['str', 'None'], tol_em: float, max_em_iter: int, pca_kwargs: Any) -> pyleoclim.core.multivardecomp.MultivariateDecomp
  plot(self, figsize: list, marker: Optional[str], markersize: Optional[float], linestyle: Optional[str], linewidth: Optional[float], colors: Union[a, one,, a], cmap: str, norm: Optional[matplotlib.colors.Normalize], xlabel: Optional[str], ylabel: Optional[str], title: Optional[str], time_unit: Optional[str], legend: bool, plot_kwargs: Optional[dict], lgd_kwargs: Optional[dict], savefig_settings: Optional[dictionary], ax: Optional[matplotlib.ax], invert_xaxis: bool) -> matplotlib.figure
  remove(self, label: Any)
  resolution(self, time_unit: Optional[Any], verbose: Any, statistic: Any) -> pyleoclim.core.resolutions.MultipleResolution
  sel(self, value: Optional[int,], time: Optional[int,], tolerance: int,) -> pyleoclim.mulitpleseries.MultipleSeries
  spectral(self, method: str;, freq: Union[str, list], settings: Optional[dict], mute_pbar: bool, freq_kwargs: Optional[dict], label: Optional[str], verbose: bool, scalogram_list: Optional[pyleoclim.core.scalograms.MultipleScalogram]) -> pyleoclim.core.psds.MultiplePSD
  stackplot(self, figsize: Optional[list], savefig_settings: Optional[dictionary], time_unit: Optional[str], xlim: Optional[list], fill_between_alpha: float, colors: Union[a, one,, a], cmap: str, norm: Optional[matplotlib.colors.Normalize], labels: Union[None,, list], ylabel_fontsize: int, spine_lw: float, grid_lw: float, label_x_loc: float, v_shift_factor: float, linewidth: float, yticks_minor: bool, xticks_minor: bool, ylims: str, plot_kwargs: Union[dict, list]) -> matplotlib.figure
  standardize(self) -> pyleoclim.core.multipleseries.MultipleSeries
  stripes(self, cmap: str, sat: float, ref_period: Optional[TYPE], figsize: Optional[list], savefig_settings: Optional[dictionary], time_unit: Optional[str], labels: Union[None,, list], label_color: Any, show_xaxis: bool, common_time_kwargs: Optional[dict], xlim: Optional[list], font_scale: float, x_offset: float) -> matplotlib.figure
  time_coverage_plot(self, figsize: list, marker: Optional[str], markersize: Optional[float], alpha: float, linestyle: Optional[str], linewidth: float, colors: Union[a, one,, a], cmap: str, norm: Optional[matplotlib.colors.Normalize], xlabel: Optional[str], ylabel: Optional[str], title: Optional[str], time_unit: Optional[str], legend: bool, inline_legend: bool, plot_kwargs: Optional[dict], lgd_kwargs: Optional[dict], label_x_offset: Union[float, list], label_y_offset: Union[float, list], savefig_settings: Optional[dictionary], ax: Optional[matplotlib.ax], ypad: Optional[Any], invert_xaxis: bool, invert_yaxis: bool) -> matplotlib.figure
  to_csv(self, path: Optional[str], args: Any, use_common_time: Any, kwargs: Any) -> None.
  to_json(self, path: Optional[str]) -> None.
  to_pandas(self, paleo_style: bool, args: Any, use_common_time: Any, kwargs: Any) -> pandas.DataFrame
  view(self) -> pd.DataFrame
  wavelet(self, method: str, settings: dict, freq: Union[str, list], freq_kwargs: Optional[dict], verbose: bool, mute_pbar: bool) -> MultipleScalograms
class pyleoclim.core.coherences.Coherence(self, frequency: Any, scale: Any, time: Any, wtc: Any, xwt: Any, phase: Any, coi: Optional[Any], wave_method: Optional[Any], wave_args: Optional[Any], timeseries1: Optional[Any], timeseries2: Optional[Any], signif_qs: Optional[Any], signif_method: Optional[Any], qs: Optional[Any], freq_method: Optional[Any], freq_kwargs: Optional[Any], Neff_threshold: Any, scale_unit: Optional[Any], time_label: Optional[Any])
  dashboard(self, title: Optional[str], figsize: list, overlap: bool, phase_style: dict, line_colors: list, savefig_settings: dict, ts_plot_kwargs: Optional[dict], wavelet_plot_kwargs: Optional[dict]) -> fig,
  phase_stats(self, scales: float, number: int, level: float) -> dict
  plot(self, var: str, xlabel: Optional[str], ylabel: Optional[str], title: str, figsize: list, ylim: Optional[list], xlim: Optional[list], in_scale: bool, yticks: Optional[list], contourf_style: dict, phase_style: dict, cbar_style: dict, savefig_settings: dict, ax: Optional[ax], signif_clr: str, signif_linestyles: str, signif_linewidths: float, signif_thresh: float, under_clr: str, over_clr: str, bad_clr: str) -> fig,
  signif_test(self, number: int, method: Literal['ar1sim', 'phaseran', 'CN'], seed: Optional[int], qs: list, settings: Optional[dict], mute_pbar: bool) -> pyleoclim.core.coherence.Coherence
class pyleoclim.core.coherences.GlobalCoherence(self, global_coh: numpy.ndarray, coh: pyleoclim.core.coherences.Coherence, signif_qs: Optional[Any], signif_method: Optional[Any], qs: Optional[Any], label: Any)
  plot(self, figsize: tuple, xlim: Optional[tuple], xlabel: Optional[str], label: Optional[str], psd_y_label: str, coh_y_label: str, coh_line_color: str, ax: Optional[matplotlib], coh_ylim: tuple, fill_alpha: float, fill_color: str, coh_plot_kwargs: Optional[dict], savefig_settings: Optional[dict], spectral_kwargs: Optional[dict], legend: bool, legend_kwargs: Optional[dict], spec1_plot_kwargs: Optional[dict], spec2_plot_kwargs: Optional[dict]) -> matplotlib
  signif_test(self, method: str;, number: int, qs: list) -> pyleoclim.core.globalcoherence.GlobalCoherence
class pyleoclim.core.corr.Corr(self, r: float, p: float, r_crit: float, signif: bool, alpha: float, p_fmt_td: float, p_fmt_style: str)
function pyleoclim.core.corr.pval_format(p: Any, threshold: Any, style: Any)
class pyleoclim.core.series.Series(self, time: Union[list, numpy.ndarray], value: numpy.ndarray, time_unit: Optional[str], time_name: Optional[str], value_name: Optional[str], value_unit: Optional[str], label: Optional[str], importedFrom: Optional[str], archiveType: Optional[str], control_archiveType: bool, log: Optional[dict], keep_log: bool, sort_ts: str, dropna: bool, verbose: bool, clean_ts: bool, auto_time_params: Optional[bool])
  bin(self, keep_log: bool, kwargs: Any) -> pyleoclim.core.series.Series
  causality(self, target_series: pyleoclim.core.series.Series, method: Literal['liang', 'granger'], timespan: Optional[tuple], settings: Optional[dict], common_time_kwargs: Optional[dict]) -> dict
  center(self, timespan: Union[tuple, list], keep_log: bool) -> pyleoclim.core.series.Series
  clean(self, verbose: bool, keep_log: bool) -> pyleoclim.core.series.Series
  compare(self, ts: pyleo.Series, row_clr: Any) -> Matplotlib
  convert_time_unit(self, time_unit: str, keep_log: bool)
  copy(self) -> pyleoclim.core.series.Series
  correlation(self, target_series: pyleoclim.core.series.Series, alpha: float, statistic: str, method: str,, number: int, timespan: Optional[tuple], settings: Optional[dict], seed: Union[float, int], common_time_kwargs: Optional[dict], mute_pbar: bool) -> pyleoclim.core.corr.Corr
  detrend(self, method: str, keep_log: bool, preserve_mean: bool, kwargs: dict) -> pyleoclim.core.series.Series
  equals(self, ts: Series, index_tol: int,, value_tol: float,) -> bool
  fill_na(self, timespan: Union[tuple, list], dt: float, keep_log: bool) -> pyleoclim.core.series.Series
  filter(self, cutoff_freq: Union[float, list], cutoff_scale: Union[float, list], method: str,, keep_log: bool, kwargs: dict) -> pyleoclim.core.series.Series
  flip(self, axis: str, keep_log: bool) -> pyleoclim.core.series.Series
  gaussianize(self, keep_log: Any) -> pyleoclim.core.series.Series
  gkernel(self, step_style: str, keep_log: bool, step_type: Optional[Any], kwargs: Any) -> pyleoclim.core.series.Series
  global_coherence(self, target_series: Optional[pyleo.Series], coh: Optional[pyleo.core.coherence.Coherence], method: str;, wavelet_kwargs: Optional[dict]) -> pyleo.core.globalcoherence.GlobalCoherence
  interp(self, method: Literal['‘linear’', '‘nearest’', '‘zero’', '‘slinear’', '‘quadratic’', '‘cubic’', '‘previous’', '‘next’'], keep_log: bool, kwargs: Any) -> pyleoclim.core.series.Series
  is_evenly_spaced(self, tol: float) -> bool
  outliers(self, method: str,, remove: bool, settings: Optional[dict], fig_outliers: bool, figsize_outliers: list, plotoutliers_kwargs: Optional[dict], savefigoutliers_settings: Optional[dict], fig_clusters: bool, figsize_clusters: list, plotclusters_kwargs: Optional[dict], savefigclusters_settings: Optional[dict], keep_log: bool) -> pyleoclim.core.series.Series
  overlap(self, ts: pyleo.Series) -> float
  pandas_method(self, method: str) -> pyleoclim.core.series.Series
  resample(self, rule: str, keep_log: Any, kwargs: dict) -> pyleoclim.core.series.SeriesResampler
  resolution(self) -> pyleoclim.core.resolutions.Resolution
  segment(self, factor: float, verbose: bool) -> Union[pyleoclim.core.multipleseries.MultipleSeries, pyleoclim.core.series.Series]
  sel(self, value: Optional[int,], time: Optional[int,], tolerance: int,) -> Copy
  slice(self, timespan: Union[tuple, list]) -> pyleoclim.core.series.Series
  sort(self, verbose: bool, ascending: Any, keep_log: bool) -> pyleoclim.core.series.Series
  spectral(self, method: str;, freq: Union[str, list], freq_kwargs: Optional[dict], settings: Optional[dict], label: Optional[str], scalogram: Optional[pyleoclim.core.series.Series.Scalogram], verbose: bool) -> pyleoclim.core.psds.PSD
  ssa(self, M: Optional[int], nMC: Any, f: float, trunc: Optional[str], var_thresh: float, online: bool;) -> object
  standardize(self, keep_log: Any, scale: Any) -> pyleoclim.core.series.Series
  stats(self) -> dictionary
  stripes(self, figsize: list, cmap: str, ref_period: Optional[array-like], sat: float, top_label: Optional[str], bottom_label: Optional[str], label_color: Any, label_size: Optional[Any], xlim: Optional[list], xlabel: Optional[Any], savefig_settings: Optional[dict], ax: Optional[matplotlib.axis], invert_xaxis: bool, show_xaxis: bool, x_offset: float) -> matplotlib.figure
  summary_plot(self, psd: pyleoclim.core.psds.PSD, scalogram: pyleoclim.core.scalograms.Scalogram, figsize: list, title: Optional[str], time_lim: Union[list, tuple], value_lim: Union[list, tuple], period_lim: Union[list, tuple], psd_lim: Union[list, tuple], time_label: Optional[str], value_label: Optional[str], period_label: Optional[str], psd_label: Optional[str], ts_plot_kwargs: Optional[dict], wavelet_plot_kwargs: Optional[dict], psd_plot_kwargs: Optional[dict], gridspec_kwargs: Optional[dict], y_label_loc: Optional[float], legend: Optional[bool], savefig_settings: Optional[dict])
  to_csv(self, metadata_header: bool, path: Optional[str])
  to_pandas(self, paleo_style: bool) -> pd.Series
  wavelet(self, method: str, settings: Optional[dict], freq: Union[str, list], freq_kwargs: Optional[dict], verbose: bool) -> Scalogram
  wavelet_coherence(self, target_series: pyleoclim.core.series.Series, method: str, settings: Optional[dict], freq: Union[str, list], freq_kwargs: Optional[dict], verbose: bool, common_time_kwargs: Optional[dict]) -> pyleoclim.core.coherence.Coherence
class pyleoclim.core.series.SeriesResampler(self, rule: Any, series: Any, metadata: Any, keep_log: Any, kwargs: Any)
function pyleoclim.core.series.dict2namedtuple(d: Any)

class pylipd.utils.rdf_graph.RDFGraph(self, graph: Optional[Any])
  clear(self)
  copy(self) -> pylipd.utils.rdf_graph.RDFGraph
  get(self, ids: Union[str, list]) -> pylipd.utils.utils.rdf_graph.RDFGraph
  get_all_graph_ids(self) -> list
  load(self, files: Any, graphid: Optional[Any])
  merge(self, rdf: pylipd.rdf_graph.RDFGraph) -> pylipd.utils.rdf_graph.RDFGraph
  pop(self, ids: Union[str, list]) -> pylipd.utils.rdf_graph.RDFGraph
  query(self, query: str, remote: bool, result: str) -> dict
  remove(self, ids: Union[str, list])
  serialize(self)
  set_endpoint(self, endpoint: str)

  add_non_standard_property(self, key: str, value: Any)

  from_json(data: dict) -> Change

  getNotess(self) -> list[str]

  get_non_standard_property(self, key: str) -> Any

  setNotess(self, notess: list[str])
  set_non_standard_property(self, key: str, value: Any)

class pylipd.classes.calibration.Calibration(self)
  from_data(id: str, data: dict) -> Calibration
  from_json(data: dict) -> Calibration
  getDOI(self) -> str
  getDatasetRange(self) -> str
  getEquation(self) -> str
  getEquationIntercept(self) -> str
  getEquationR2(self) -> str
  getEquationSlope(self) -> str
  getEquationSlopeUncertainty(self) -> str
  getMethod(self) -> str
  getMethodDetail(self) -> str
  getProxyDataset(self) -> str
  getSeasonality(self) -> str
  getTargetDataset(self) -> str
  getUncertainty(self) -> str

  setDatasetRange(self, datasetRange: str)
  setEquation(self, equation: str)
  setEquationIntercept(self, equationIntercept: str)
  setEquationR2(self, equationR2: str)
  setEquationSlope(self, equationSlope: str)
  setEquationSlopeUncertainty(self, equationSlopeUncertainty: str)

  setMethodDetail(self, methodDetail: str)
  setProxyDataset(self, proxyDataset: str)
  setSeasonality(self, seasonality: str)
  setTargetDataset(self, targetDataset: str)
  setUncertainty(self, uncertainty: str)

  getSeasonalityOriginal(self) -> pylipd.classes.interpretationseasonality.InterpretationSeasonality

  getVariableGeneral(self) -> str

  setDirection(self, direction: str)
  setLocal(self, local: str)

  setScope(self, scope: str)
  setSeasonality(self, seasonality: pylipd.classes.interpretationseasonality.InterpretationSeasonality)
  setSeasonalityGeneral(self, seasonalityGeneral: pylipd.classes.interpretationseasonality.InterpretationSeasonality)
  setSeasonalityOriginal(self, seasonalityOriginal: pylipd.classes.interpretationseasonality.InterpretationSeasonality)
  setVariable(self, variable: pylipd.classes.interpretationvariable.InterpretationVariable)
  setVariableDetail(self, variableDetail: str)
  setVariableGeneral(self, variableGeneral: str)
  setVariableGeneralDirection(self, variableGeneralDirection: str)

class pylipd.classes.variable.Variable(self)
  addCalibratedVia(self, calibratedVias: pylipd.classes.calibration.Calibration)
  addInterpretation(self, interpretations: pylipd.classes.interpretation.Interpretation)
  addPhysicalSample(self, physicalSamples: pylipd.classes.physicalsample.PhysicalSample)
  from_data(id: str, data: dict) -> Variable
  from_json(data: dict) -> Variable
  getArchiveType(self) -> pylipd.classes.archivetype.ArchiveType
  getCalibratedVias(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.calibration.Calibration]
  getColumnNumber(self) -> int
  getDescription(self) -> str
  getFoundInDataset(self) -> object
  getFoundInTable(self) -> object
  getInstrument(self) -> object
  getInterpretations(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.interpretation.Interpretation]
  getMissingValue(self) -> str
  getPartOfCompilation(self) -> pylipd.classes.compilation.Compilation
  getPhysicalSamples(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.physicalsample.PhysicalSample]
  getProxy(self) -> pylipd.classes.paleoproxy.PaleoProxy
  getProxyGeneral(self) -> pylipd.classes.paleoproxygeneral.PaleoProxyGeneral
  getResolution(self) -> pylipd.classes.resolution.Resolution
  getStandardVariable(self) -> pylipd.classes.paleovariable.PaleoVariable
  getUncertaintyAnalytical(self) -> str
  getUncertaintyReproducibility(self) -> str
  getValues(self) -> str
  getVariableId(self) -> str
  getVariableType(self) -> str
  isComposite(self) -> bool
  isPrimary(self) -> bool
  setArchiveType(self, archiveType: pylipd.classes.archivetype.ArchiveType)
  setCalibratedVias(self, calibratedVias: list[pylipd.classes.calibration.Calibration])
  setColumnNumber(self, columnNumber: int)
  setComposite(self, composite: bool)
  setDescription(self, description: str)
  setFoundInDataset(self, foundInDataset: object)
  setFoundInTable(self, foundInTable: object)
  setInstrument(self, instrument: object)
  setInterpretations(self, interpretations: list[pylipd.classes.interpretation.Interpretation])
  setMissingValue(self, missingValue: str)
  setPartOfCompilation(self, partOfCompilation: pylipd.classes.compilation.Compilation)
  setPhysicalSamples(self, physicalSamples: list[pylipd.classes.physicalsample.PhysicalSample])
  setPrimary(self, primary: bool)
  setProxy(self, proxy: pylipd.classes.paleoproxy.PaleoProxy)
  setProxyGeneral(self, proxyGeneral: pylipd.classes.paleoproxygeneral.PaleoProxyGeneral)
  setResolution(self, resolution: pylipd.classes.resolution.Resolution)
  setStandardVariable(self, standardVariable: pylipd.classes.paleovariable.PaleoVariable)
  setUncertaintyAnalytical(self, uncertaintyAnalytical: str)
  setUncertaintyReproducibility(self, uncertaintyReproducibility: str)
  setValues(self, values: str)
  setVariableId(self, variableId: str)
  setVariableType(self, variableType: str)
class pylipd.classes.datatable.DataTable(self)
  addVariable(self, variables: pylipd.classes.variable.Variable)
  from_data(id: str, data: dict) -> DataTable
  from_json(data: dict) -> DataTable
  getDataFrame(self, use_standard_names: Any) -> pandas.core.frame.DataFrame
  getFileName(self) -> str
  getVariables(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.variable.Variable]
  setDataFrame(self, df: pandas.core.frame.DataFrame)
  setFileName(self, fileName: str)
  setVariables(self, variables: list[pylipd.classes.variable.Variable])
class pylipd.classes.model.Model(self)
  addDistributionTable(self, distributionTables: pylipd.classes.datatable.DataTable)
  addEnsembleTable(self, ensembleTables: pylipd.classes.datatable.DataTable)
  addSummaryTable(self, summaryTables: pylipd.classes.datatable.DataTable)
  from_data(id: str, data: dict) -> Model
  from_json(data: dict) -> Model
  getCode(self) -> str
  getDistributionTables(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.datatable.DataTable]
  getEnsembleTables(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.datatable.DataTable]
  getSummaryTables(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.datatable.DataTable]
  setCode(self, code: str)
  setDistributionTables(self, distributionTables: list[pylipd.classes.datatable.DataTable])
  setEnsembleTables(self, ensembleTables: list[pylipd.classes.datatable.DataTable])
  setSummaryTables(self, summaryTables: list[pylipd.classes.datatable.DataTable])
class pylipd.classes.chrondata.ChronData(self)
  addMeasurementTable(self, measurementTables: pylipd.classes.datatable.DataTable)
  addModeledBy(self, modeledBy: pylipd.classes.model.Model)
  from_data(id: str, data: dict) -> ChronData
  from_json(data: dict) -> ChronData
  getMeasurementTables(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.datatable.DataTable]
  getModeledBy(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.model.Model]
  setMeasurementTables(self, measurementTables: list[pylipd.classes.datatable.DataTable])
  setModeledBy(self, modeledBy: list[pylipd.classes.model.Model])
class pylipd.classes.person.Person(self)
  from_data(id: str, data: dict) -> Person
  from_json(data: dict) -> Person
class pylipd.classes.funding.Funding(self)
  addGrant(self, grants: str)
  addInvestigator(self, investigators: pylipd.classes.person.Person)
  from_data(id: str, data: dict) -> Funding
  from_json(data: dict) -> Funding
  getFundingAgency(self) -> str
  getFundingCountry(self) -> str
  getGrants(self) -> list[str]
  getInvestigators(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.person.Person]
  setFundingAgency(self, fundingAgency: str)
  setFundingCountry(self, fundingCountry: str)
  setGrants(self, grants: list[str])
  setInvestigators(self, investigators: list[pylipd.classes.person.Person])
class pylipd.classes.location.Location(self)
  from_data(id: str, data: dict) -> Location
  from_json(data: dict) -> Location
  getContinent(self) -> str
  getCoordinates(self) -> str
  getCoordinatesFor(self) -> object
  getCountry(self) -> str
  getCountryOcean(self) -> str
  getElevation(self) -> str
  getGeometryType(self) -> str
  getLatitude(self) -> str
  getLocationName(self) -> str
  getLocationType(self) -> str
  getLongitude(self) -> str
  getOcean(self) -> str
  getSiteName(self) -> str
  setContinent(self, continent: str)
  setCoordinates(self, coordinates: str)
  setCoordinatesFor(self, coordinatesFor: object)
  setCountry(self, country: str)
  setCountryOcean(self, countryOcean: str)
  setElevation(self, elevation: str)
  setGeometryType(self, geometryType: str)
  setLatitude(self, latitude: str)
  setLocationName(self, locationName: str)
  setLocationType(self, locationType: str)
  setLongitude(self, longitude: str)
  setOcean(self, ocean: str)
  setSiteName(self, siteName: str)

  from_data(id: str, data: dict) -> PaleoData
  from_json(data: dict) -> PaleoData
class pylipd.classes.publication.Publication(self)
  addAuthor(self, authors: pylipd.classes.person.Person)
  addDataUrl(self, dataUrls: str)
  addUrl(self, urls: str)
  from_data(id: str, data: dict) -> Publication
  from_json(data: dict) -> Publication
  getAbstract(self) -> str
  getAuthors(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.person.Person]
  getCitation(self) -> str
  getCiteKey(self) -> str
  getDataUrls(self) -> list[str]
  getFirstAuthor(self) -> pylipd.classes.person.Person
  getInstitution(self) -> str
  getIssue(self) -> str
  getJournal(self) -> str
  getPages(self) -> str
  getPublicationType(self) -> str
  getPublisher(self) -> str
  getReport(self) -> str
  getTitle(self) -> str
  getUrls(self) -> list[str]
  getVolume(self) -> str
  getYear(self) -> int
  setAbstract(self, abstract: str)
  setAuthors(self, authors: list[pylipd.classes.person.Person])
  setCitation(self, citation: str)
  setCiteKey(self, citeKey: str)
  setDataUrls(self, dataUrls: list[str])
  setFirstAuthor(self, firstAuthor: pylipd.classes.person.Person)
  setInstitution(self, institution: str)
  setIssue(self, issue: str)
  setJournal(self, journal: str)
  setPages(self, pages: str)
  setPublicationType(self, publicationType: str)
  setPublisher(self, publisher: str)
  setReport(self, report: str)
  setTitle(self, title: str)
  setUrls(self, urls: list[str])
  setVolume(self, volume: str)
  setYear(self, year: int)
class pylipd.classes.dataset.Dataset(self)
  addChangeLog(self, changeLogs: pylipd.classes.changelog.ChangeLog)
  addChronData(self, chronData: pylipd.classes.chrondata.ChronData)
  addCreator(self, creators: pylipd.classes.person.Person)
  addFunding(self, fundings: pylipd.classes.funding.Funding)
  addPaleoData(self, paleoData: pylipd.classes.paleodata.PaleoData)
  addPublication(self, publications: pylipd.classes.publication.Publication)
  from_data(id: str, data: dict) -> Dataset
  from_json(data: dict) -> Dataset
  getChangeLogs(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.changelog.ChangeLog]
  getChronData(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.chrondata.ChronData]
  getCollectionName(self) -> str
  getCollectionYear(self) -> str
  getCompilationNest(self) -> str
  getContributor(self) -> pylipd.classes.person.Person
  getCreators(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.person.Person]
  getDataSource(self) -> str
  getDatasetId(self) -> str
  getFundings(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.funding.Funding]
  getLocation(self) -> pylipd.classes.location.Location
  getOriginalDataUrl(self) -> str
  getPaleoData(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.paleodata.PaleoData]
  getPublications(self) -> list[pylipd.classes.publication.Publication]
  getSpreadsheetLink(self) -> str
  setChangeLogs(self, changeLogs: list[pylipd.classes.changelog.ChangeLog])
  setChronData(self, chronData: list[pylipd.classes.chrondata.ChronData])
  setCollectionName(self, collectionName: str)
  setCollectionYear(self, collectionYear: str)
  setCompilationNest(self, compilationNest: str)
  setContributor(self, contributor: pylipd.classes.person.Person)
  setCreators(self, creators: list[pylipd.classes.person.Person])
  setDataSource(self, dataSource: str)
  setDatasetId(self, datasetId: str)
  setFundings(self, fundings: list[pylipd.classes.funding.Funding])
  setLocation(self, location: pylipd.classes.location.Location)
  setOriginalDataUrl(self, originalDataUrl: str)
  setPaleoData(self, paleoData: list[pylipd.classes.paleodata.PaleoData])
  setPublications(self, publications: list[pylipd.classes.publication.Publication])
  setSpreadsheetLink(self, spreadsheetLink: str)

  load_data_in_graph(self, data: Any)
class pylipd.utils.rdf_to_json.RDFToJSON(self, id: Any, graph: rdflib.graph.ConjunctiveGraph)

class pylipd.lipd_series.LiPDSeries(self, graph: Optional[Any])
  filter_by_name(self, name: str) -> pylipd.lipd_series.LiPDSeries
  filter_by_proxy(self, proxy: str) -> pylipd.lipd_series.LiPDSeries
  filter_by_resolution(self, threshold: float, stats: str) -> pylipd.lipd_series.LiPDSeries
  get_all_proxy(self) -> list
  get_all_variable_names(self) -> list
  get_all_variables(self) -> pandas.DataFrame
  get_timeseries_essentials(self) -> pandas.DataFrame
  get_variable_properties(self) -> list
  load(self, lipd: pylipd.lipd.LiPD, parallel: Any)
class pylipd.lipd.LiPD(self, graph: Optional[Any])
  convert_lipd_dir_to_rdf(self, lipd_dir: str, rdf_file: str, parallel: Any, standardize: Any, add_labels: Any)
  create_lipd(self, dsname: str, lipdfile: str) -> dict
  filter_by_archive_type(self, archiveType: str) -> pylipd.lipd.LiPD
  filter_by_compilationName(self, compilationName: str) -> pylipd.lipd.LiPD
  filter_by_datasetName(self, datasetName: str) -> pylipd.lipd.LiPD
  filter_by_geo_bbox(self, lonMin: float, latMin: float, lonMax: float, latMax: float) -> pylipd.lipd.LiPD
  filter_by_time(self, timeBound: list, timeBoundType: str, recordLength: Optional[float]) -> pylipd.lipd.LiPD
  get(self, dsnames: Union[str, list]) -> pylipd.lipd.LiPD
  get_all_archiveTypes(self) -> list
  get_all_compilation_names(self) -> list
  get_all_dataset_ids(self) -> list
  get_all_dataset_names(self) -> list
  get_all_locations(self, dsname: Optional[str]) -> pandas.DataFrame
  get_bibtex(self, remote: bool, save: bool, path: str, verbose: bool) -> list
  get_dataset_properties(self) -> list
  get_datasets(self) -> list[Dataset]
  get_ensemble_tables(self, dsname: Optional[str], ensembleVarName: Optional[str], ensembleDepthVarName: str) -> dataframe
  get_lipd(self, dsname: str) -> dict
  get_model_properties(self) -> list
  get_timeseries(self, dsnames: list, to_dataframe: bool, mode: Any, time: Any) -> dict
  get_timeseries_essentials(self, dsnames: Optional[list], mode: paleo,) -> pandas.DataFrame
  load(self, lipdfiles: list, parallel: bool, standardize: Any, add_labels: Any)
  load_datasets(self, datasets: list[Dataset])
  load_from_dir(self, dir_path: str, parallel: bool, cutoff: Optional[int], standardize: Any, add_labels: Any)
  load_remote_datasets(self, dsnames: list, load_default_graph: Any)
  pop(self, dsnames: Union[str, list]) -> pylipd.lipd.LiPD
  remove(self, dsnames: Union[str, list])
  to_lipd_series(self, parallel: bool) -> pylipd.lipd_series.LiPDSeries
  update_remote_datasets(self, dsnames: Any)

class pylipd.classes.uncertainty.Uncertainty(self)

  from_data(id: Any, data: Any) -> Uncertainty
  from_json(data: Any) -> Uncertainty

  get_non_standard_property(self, key: Any)
  setUncertaintyType(self, uncertaintyType: str)
  set_non_standard_property(self, key: Any, value: Any)
  to_data(self, data: Any)

class ammonyte.core.rqa_res.RQARes(self, time: Any, value: Any, time_name: Optional[Any], time_unit: Optional[Any], value_name: Optional[Any], value_unit: Optional[Any], series: Optional[Any], label: Optional[Any], m: Optional[Any], tau: Optional[Any], eps: Optional[Any], eigenmap: Optional[Any], w_size: Optional[Any], w_incre: Optional[Any])
  confidence_fill_plot(self, ax: Optional[matplotlib.axes], line_color: Optional[str,], fill_color: Optional[str,], fill_alpha: Optional[float], transition_interval: Optional[list,tuple], xlabel: Optional[str], ylabel: Optional[str], marker: Optional[str], markersize: Optional[float], linestyle: Optional[str], linewidth: Optional[float], alpha: Optional[float], label: Optional[str], title: Optional[str], zorder: Optional[int], plot_kwargs: Optional[dict], ci_kwargs: Optional[dict], background_series: Optional[pyleoclim.core.series.Series], background_kwargs: Optional[dict], legend: bool;, lgd_kwargs: Optional[dict]) -> matplotlib.figure
  confidence_smooth_plot(self, block_size: int, figsize: Any, ax: Optional[matplotlib.axes], transition_interval: Optional[list,tuple], color: Optional[str,], label: Optional[str], xlabel: Optional[str], ylabel: Optional[str], title: Optional[str], ci_kwargs: Optional[Any], background_series: Optional[pyleoclim.core.series.Series], background_kwargs: Optional[dict], hline_kwargs: Optional[dict], ci_plot_kwargs: Optional[dict], legend: bool;, lgd_kwargs: Optional[dict]) -> matplotlib.figure
  plot_eigenmaps(self, groups: list,tuple;, axes: list,tuple, figsize: list,tuple, cmap: str,, cmap_kwargs: Optional[dict], ax: Optional[matplotlib.axes.Axes], title: Optional[Any]) -> matplotlib.figure
  plot_eigenmaps_FI(self, groups: list,tuple;, axes: list,tuple, block_smooth: bool;, cmap: str, cmap_kwargs: Optional[dict], figsize: list,tuple, ax: Optional[matplotlib.axes.Axes], FI_axis_lims: Optional[list,tuple], scale: Any, title: Optional[Any]) -> matplotlib.figure
  smooth(self, block_size: int) -> ammonyte.core.rqa_res.RQARes
class ammonyte.core.recurrence_matrix.RecurrenceMatrix(self, matrix: Any, time: Any, epsilon: Any, m: Any, tau: Any, series: Optional[Any], value_name: Optional[Any], value_unit: Optional[Any], time_name: Optional[Any], time_unit: Optional[Any], label: Optional[Any])
  laplacian_eigenmaps(self, w_size: int, w_incre: int) -> pyleoclim.Series
  plot(self, figsize: tuple, xlabel: Optional[str], ylabel: Optional[str], title: Optional[str], imshow_kwargs: Optional[dict])
class ammonyte.core.recurrence_network.RecurrenceNetwork(self, matrix: Any, time: Any, epsilon: Any, series: Optional[Any], value_name: Optional[Any], value_unit: Optional[Any], time_name: Optional[Any], time_unit: Optional[Any], label: Optional[Any])
class ammonyte.core.time_embedded_series.TimeEmbeddedSeries(self, series: Any, m: Any, tau: Optional[Any], embedded_data: Optional[Any], embedded_time: Optional[Any], value_name: Optional[Any], value_unit: Optional[Any], time_name: Optional[Any], time_unit: Optional[Any], label: Optional[Any])
  create_recurrence_matrix(self, epsilon: float) -> ammonyte.RecurrenceMatrix
  create_recurrence_network(self, epsilon: float) -> ammonyte.RecurrenceNetwork
  find_epsilon(self, eps: float, target_density: float, tolerance: float, initial_density: Optional[float], parallelize: bool;, num_processes: Optional[int], amp: int, verbose: bool;) -> float
class ammonyte.core.series.Series(self, time: Union[list, numpy.ndarray], value: numpy.ndarray, time_unit: Optional[str], time_name: Optional[str], value_name: Optional[str], value_unit: Optional[str], label: Optional[str], importedFrom: Optional[str], archiveType: Optional[str], control_archiveType: bool, log: Optional[dict], keep_log: bool, sort_ts: str, dropna: bool, verbose: bool, clean_ts: bool, auto_time_params: Optional[bool])
  determinism(self, window_size: int, overlap: int, m: int, tau: int, eps: float) -> ammonyte.core.series.Series
  embed(self, m: Any, tau: Optional[Any])
  laminarity(self, window_size: int, overlap: int, m: int, tau: int, eps: float) -> ammonyte.core.series.Series
